channel.title: Q&A on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Q&A on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Questions & Answers, Part 2
item.description:
Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to answer more questions, so I’m going to do a question and answers — part two, which I haven’t done for a while.

I want to answer some questions that people have asked, and some of these were asked quite a while ago, so I apologize, but they were asked and they were. They needed an answer. That was longer than something I just wanted to type really quickly, but they weren’t really a whole video, so I waited until I had a few of these. I think I have four or five of them and I figured I’d just do one video and knock them all out.

item.title: Questions I Can't (Or Won't) Answer
item.description:
Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about questions I can’t or won’t answer.

There’s a lot of questions that get asked on this channel. I try to answer them either right there on the comment section or I’ll even do a video about them if it requires a longer answer, and I’ll talk about that. But I noticed there’s a lot of questions that I’m skipping, so I thought I kind of talk about why I do that and put it all here in one video, so if people are wondering why I’m doing it, they can look at this video.

item.title: Questions & Answers
item.description:
Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I’m going to try to answer several questions that I’ve gotten on the channel through comments.

I was trying to make video about each one of them but they don’t. I I don’t want to Pat a video just to make 10 or 15 minutes and I think I can do a number of comments if I just go through them all at once. So I’m going to try to do that. See how that works.

item.title: No Simple Answers
item.description:
Hey everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about a variety of topics that have been questions that people have submitted that

I’ve put on a list that I called no simple answers. These were questions that were frequently: hey, do you prefer this or this, or could you tell me the pros and cons of this and this? Or why did you used to do this? And then you did this later in other games, and it basically boils down to: there’s a lot of different ways of putting in features and working in groups and making games and some of them don’t have simple answers.

item.title: Frequently Asked Questions
item.description:
Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim.

The channel has now passed 15 000 subscribers. I’m still reading all the comments, but I have given up on replying to any of them. Um, I used to reply to some occasionally.

Part of it is there’s just too many coming in too fast, literally why? Why I was answering a question, another question would come in also. I’ve noticed that even when I’ve answered questions, people then ask the same question, sometimes in the same section. So what I decided to do is I gathered up a lot of questions have been answered or been asked multiple times and I’m going to answer them here. This is going to be my first fact. My first frequent answer asked questions.
